title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 04 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 04 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 04 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/09/2024
Today, iron ore futures continued to decline, with the most-traded contract I2501 falling below 700 points, ultimately closing at 689.5, down 3.09% for the day.Traders showed a low willingness to sell. Steel mills were cautiously observing the market, mainly engaging in small and frequent purchases. In Shandong, the transaction price of PB fines was around 690-695 yuan/mt, down 10-15 yuan/mt from yesterday; in Tangshan, the transaction price of PB fines was around 705-710 yuan/mt, also down 10-15 yuan/mt from yesterday.
